meaning: n.鐮佸ご宸ヤ汉,鐢叉澘姘存墜
examples: I'm only fit for a roustabout.
If you're not sure what a Roustabout is, you're probably not alone.
Being a roustabout was rated the worst, followed by lumberjack, ironworker, dairy farmer and welder.
The job replaced last year's loser, roustabout, also known as an oil rig worker.
He is proud of having been a youthful deckhand on an Arctic salvage boat and a roustabout in the Alberta oilfields.
